columns.description: The unique key for each location.
columns.name: location_id

compiled_code:
with

source as (

    select * from shaman.raw.raw_stores

),

renamed as (

    select

        ----------  ids
        id as location_id,

        ---------- text
        name as location_name,

        ---------- numerics
        tax_rate,

        ---------- timestamps
        date_trunc('day', opened_at) as opened_date

    from source

)

select * from renamed
description: List of open locations with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per location.
label: stg_locations

macros.name: date_trunc

name: stg_locations
raw_code:
with

source as (

    select * from {{ source('ecom', 'raw_stores') }}

),

renamed as (

    select

        ----------  ids
        id as location_id,

        ---------- text
        name as location_name,

        ---------- numerics
        tax_rate,

        ---------- timestamps
        {{ dbt.date_trunc('day', 'opened_at') }} as opened_date

    from source

)

select * from renamed
